contestedTitles: 'Condition updates when active location changes' scenario has no dedicated test
`aria-label` on an `aria-hidden="true"` element is dead and contradicts the decorative intent
Day/night gradient is read once at mount and never refreshed on a timer — a long-lived session does not transition day↔night as the location's clock crosses sunrise/sunset
resolution: All 5 confirmed + 3 contested fixed (+3 regression tests, 509 total; battery green). CORE FR-ANIM-02 bug fixed: utc_offset_seconds threaded forecast->WeatherProvider->isDaytime, which converts the absolute instant to the LOCATION local wall clock and compares time-of-day (calendar-mismatch-proof); a new host-independent timezone test flips day<->night purely on the offset (verified: 11:00 location-local => DAY despite 02:00 viewer-UTC). Live ~60s day/night tick added (cleanup, console-silent). Dead aria-label removed (aria-hidden only). Tests added: cross-timezone component regression, offset unit cases, condition-change reactivity. ForecastSection + all existing tests green (utcOffsetSeconds optional to preserve NOT_LOADED 4-key shape).
